purpose: Defines honest commit finalization semantics and external verification fields that avoid the self-head paradox.
required_questions: What head was known before this commit existed?
What head does the receipt content describe?
What head was verified after push?
Can clean PASS be blocked when semantics contradict?
pass_criteria: No ambiguous final_head authority claim for clean PASS
Pre-commit and post-push head fields are separated
block_criteria: Strict self-finalization claim inside containing commit
Contradictory semantics with clean PASS still allowed
next_action: Admit schema/checker into replay loops and migrate legacy receipt producers.
